pad1.name: `cue_name 1 remix`
pad1.color: param_equal "`cue_name 1 remix`" "" ? color '#333333' : param_contains "End" "`cue_name 1 remix`" ? color '#FF3B30' : color '#2BD976'

pad2.name: `cue_name 2 remix`
pad2.color: param_equal "`cue_name 2 remix`" "" ? color '#333333' : param_contains "End" "`cue_name 2 remix`" ? color '#FF3B30' : color '#2BD976'

pad3.color: param_equal "`cue_name 3 remix`" "" ? color '#333333' : param_contains "End" "`cue_name 3 remix`" ? color '#FF3B30' : color '#2BD976'

pad4.color: param_equal "`cue_name 4 remix`" "" ? color '#333333' : param_contains "End" "`cue_name 4 remix`" ? color '#FF3B30' : color '#2BD976'
